# terrible_community_general_keycloak_component (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the component to create.
- `parent_id` (String) The parent_id of the component. In practice the ID (name) of the realm.
- `provider_id` (String) The name of the "provider ID" for the key.
- `provider_type` (String) The name of the "provider type" for the key. That is, `org.keycloak.storage.UserStorageProvider`, `org.keycloak.userprofile.UserProfileProvider`, ... See https://www.keycloak.org/docs/latest/server_development/index.html#_providers.

### Optional

- `config` (String) Configuration properties for the provider. Contents vary depending on the provider type.
- `state` (String) State of the Keycloak component. On `present`, the component is created (or updated if it exists already). On `absent`, the component is removed if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of the keycloak_component after module execution.
